page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the ecs.gn5i family, virtualized via the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores with 16 vCPUs, operating at a ratio of one thread per core. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance includes a bundled hardware accelerator consisting of one NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is not included on this instance, requiring external network-attached storage solutions for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

The hardware configuration balances dedicated CPU resources with entry-level GPU acceleration, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads requiring parallel processing without the overhead of high-end GPU models. Appropriate workloads include low-latency inference, media transcoding, video streaming, and general-purpose GPU-accelerated computing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.4xlarge is an x86_64 GPU-accelerated server instance virtualized via KVM. It features 16 dedicated physical cores (16 vCPUs) with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, paired with 64.0 GB of system memory. The instance integrates a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM to support parallel computing tasks. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. This hardware profile offers a qualitatively cost-efficient platform for entry-level GPU workloads, avoiding the higher costs associated with larger accelerator models. It is suitable for workloads such as media transcoding, video streaming, low-latency inference, and general-purpose GPU-assisted applications.
